system.effect: This spell affects a specific area within which no supernatural powers can take effect. No spells with Zeonic values of 150 or below, no Psychic Powers with Potentials lower than 150, and no Ki Technique costing less than a total of 13 Ki Points will work within this area. In the same way, no Summoning activities with a Difficulty under 200 are allowed. The maximum area covered with this spell is a 150-foot radius, which remains stationary.
system.addedEffect: +150 feet to radius, +5 to Zeonic value, +5 to Psychic Potential, +2 Ki Points and +10 to Summoning Difficulty
